Step past
the rope.

The Bonnet Gang doesn't wait in line. Join the Discord, claim your tier, and skip straight to the front of the BonnetSubmit queue — get heard first, live on stream.

Join the DiscordSee the perks
the line starts here
The perk that matters

Your track. Front of the queue.

Every beat, every feature request, every BonnetSubmit drop runs through one queue. Free riders wait. The Gang cuts the line — and gets heard first, live on stream.

Three ways in

Pick your door.

Three doors into the Bonnet Gang. One of them moves you to the front of the line.

The Squad

Roll with the movement.

Free
↑Standard queue placement
  • Access to the community Discord
  • Live stream alerts & event pings
  • Submit a track in BonnetSubmit each round
  • Vibe in the chat during streams
Join free
Most popular

Inner Circle

Skip the line, get heard first.

$4.99/mo
↑Priority placement in the queue
  • Everything in The Squad
  • Priority placement in the BonnetSubmit queue
  • Supporter role + colored name in Discord
  • Behind-the-scenes drops & early track previews
  • Monthly shout-out on stream
Become a Supporter
VIP

Bonnet Gang

All-access. First in line. Always.

$14.99/mo
↑Front of the queue — #1, always
  • Everything in Inner Circle
  • Top priority — your track plays first
  • Guaranteed feedback on every submission
  • Private VIP channel + monthly hangout
  • Eligible for collab & feature spotlights
  • Exclusive Bonnet Gang drops

Go all-access

Secure checkout happens inside Discord. Cancel anytime.

How it works

Four steps to the front.

From outside the rope to first in line — in about a minute.
01

Join the Discord

Tap in, grab the @Squad role, and you're inside the Bonnet Gang — free, instantly.

02

Pick your tier

Upgrade through Discord's own Server Subscriptions. Checkout never leaves the server.

03

Get your role

Your colored role drops automatically — unlocking channels, previews, and perks.

04

Skip the line

Drop a track in BonnetSubmit and your tier jumps you up the live queue — heard first on stream.

The ledger

What's behind each door.

Every perk, side by side. Queue priority is the line that matters.

PerkThe SquadFreeInner Circle$4.99/moBonnet Gang$14.99/mo

Ask the doorman

Questions at the rope.

Everything you need to know before you step past it.

The rope's right there.

Step inside, claim your tier, and never wait in line again. Get your track heard first — live on Kye Beezy's stream.

Join the Discord

Checkout happens safely inside Discord.

KYE BEEZY.

Official home of Kye Beezy. Stream the music, catch the live Twitch vibes, drop your track into BonnetSubmit, and join the Bonnet Gang.
